hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.go) gofmt -w "$f" ;; *.ts|*.tsx) root="$(git -C "$(dirname "$f")" rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)"; bin="$root/web/node_modules/.bin/eslint"; [ -x "$bin" ] && "$bin" --fix "$f" ;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true
